item.title: Pierre Qui Roule
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: PierreQuiRoule is a third-person platformer physic-based game developed on UE5. You play as a rock tax collector gathering moss from the other rolling stones in the kingdom of Rouleroche.

item.title: PierreQuiRoule's Meteor Strike
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: The Meteor Strike VFX from Pierre Qui Roule.

item.title: LD_Chemical Laboratory
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: We had to create a unique level design with a given theme and limited gameplay phases. Game designers would do the LD and the code, the artists had to dress up the bloc out. And together we had to create a logical narrative experience though the walkthrough.

item.title: Stellar Library
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: We had to code in blueprint and then in C++ a procedural tower / library in one month.

item.title: Frog In A Transpalette
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: This game is a racing game where you have to go the furthest possible. You have to crush frgos in order to refill your fuel using their blood.

item.title: TranspaletteJam's VFX
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: The VFX I made for this Jam.

item.title: Clair Obscurd inspired VFX
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: Some Clair Obscur : Expedition 33 VFX I made for a potential personnal project.

item.title: Tokar Tournament
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: Tockar Tournament is a death match pvp online game. It’s based on Unreal Tournament. This project was made in one month with two other friends.

item.title: Tokar Tournament's VFX
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: The Main VFX I made for Tockar Tournament.

item.title: Save System
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: This was a small Narrative project where we had to create a understandable scene with a maximum of environemental storytelling as possible and without any dialogs.

item.title: The Cube
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: This was a UX based tiny project where we had to create a game that transmitted something philosophical.

item.title: Jusant DLC, ABYSS
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: A Jusant imaginary DLC, made in two months with a 8 person group projet. It was a shared project with two group (total of 17 members) sharing some code and assets to speed up the production and higher the results

item.title: Spooder Dance
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Aenean in eleifend justo, vestibulum congue lacus. Quisque est libero, lacinia sed placerat ac, interdum id urna.

item.title: Black Hole Explosion VFX
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: A Black Hole explosion vfx I made for myself.

item.title: Kokoro Renzu
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: Kokoro Renzu is an open world card playing game. The player has to explore and take photos to create his own deck and beath the elders of the village.

item.title: Sea Of Love
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: This project was a small feedback driven exercise. In a team of 2 we had to create a small narrative game with many visual and audio feedbacks.

item.title: Thunder
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: The thunder VFX I made for Kokoro Renzu.

item.title: Fix dat game
item.author: yo.perrette@gmail.com (Yohann Perrette)
item.description: In a group of 2 we had to first fix a fully bugged game and then add features to give this project a real gameplay.
